from typing import cast, Union, List


def process_user_data(data: Union[dict, list]) -> dict:
    result = cast(dict, data)
    return result


def get_first_item(items: Union[List[str], str]) -> str:
    first = cast(List[str], items)[0]
    return first


class UserService:
    def get_profile(self, user_id: Union[int, str]) -> dict:
        raw = self._fetch(user_id)
        profile = cast(dict, raw)
        return profile

    def _fetch(self, user_id):
        return {"id": user_id, "name": "Alice"}


def parse_response(response: Union[str, bytes, None]) -> str:
    text = cast(str, response)
    return text.upper()
